package.name: nav2_mppi_controller_cuda_plugin
package.description: CudaMPPIController: nav2_core::Controller plugin that injects the nav_algo_mppi_cuda CUDA backend into a vendored, patched nav2_mppi_controller_cuda::Optimizer at configure() time. When use_cuda=true the per-iteration MPPI body (generateNoisedTrajectories + evalTrajectoriesScores + updateControlSequence) runs on the GPU. When false, the upstream xtensor CPU path runs unchanged.
